chunks.title: Judgment on the House of Judah
chunks.reason: A unified oracle delivered to the king and people concerning justice and the consequence of disobedience.

chunks.title: Lament for Shallum
chunks.reason: A specific prophetic declaration regarding the exile and death of King Jehoahaz (Shallum).

chunks.title: Woe to Jehoiakim
chunks.reason: A detailed condemnation of King Jehoiakim's greed and lack of justice, contrasting him with his father Josiah.

chunks.title: Judgment on Coniah
chunks.reason: A final oracle declaring the childless fate of King Jehoiachin (Coniah) and his removal from the throne.
